title: Boston Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Boston with a Z-Score of +5.29. This anomaly has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Boston is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 17.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 32%, and the wind speed is 23.9 km/h, which is not providing significant relief. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, emphasizing the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
